summary: Good‑quality (source unknown) recording of a memorable Greek Theatre show featuring the breakout “Keep On Growing” and a rare Morning Dew opener.
review: Both reviewers rave about this Greek Theatre performance, highlighting the debut of “Keep On Growing,” the resurfacing of classics like “Stagger Lee” and “Comes A Time,” and an unexpected Morning Dew to start the second set. No recording‑specific issues were mentioned, suggesting the audio is at least listenable.

ai_rating.rationale: Two consistent 4‑star reviews praise the musical performance; no technical complaints imply a decent recording, yielding an overall solid rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not comment on soundboard vs. audience or any audio flaws, indicating the recording is generally acceptable.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The set is praised for its rare Morning Dew opener to the second set and a strong mix of newer and classic material, creating an especially memorable Greek run.
